import React from 'react'; import { NavLink } from 'react-router-dom'; import 'bootstrap/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css'; import '../styles.css'; const Navbar = () => { return (
Land Registry
  • Home
  • Manage Land
  • Admin
  • About
  • Features
  • Contact Us
); }; export default Navbar;
